case_title: ROGUE MOVING & STORAGE VS. JENISE DELGADO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-19-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, JENISE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2010, APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT, BOTH EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. MATTER TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2010 BY COMM. PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROGUE MOVING & STORAGE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2010 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,125.00 FILED BY ROGUE MOVING & STORAGE AS TO DEFENDANT DELGADO, JENISE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROGUE MOVING & STORAGE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELGADO, JENISE ALTHROUGH IT APPEARS UNDISPUTED THAT PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO PAYMENT FOR ITS SERVICES, THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT DELGADO IS INDIVIDUALLY LIABLE FOR THIS CLAIM. PLAINTIFF MAY PROCEED AGAINST THOMASON AUTOGROUP OR OTHER APPRORIATE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
